ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the track */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the track was released */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the track (on a scale of 0 to 1) */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the track (on a scale of 0 to 1) */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the track (on a scale of 0 to 11) */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track (in decibels) */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (0 for minor, 1 for major) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track (on a scale of 0 to 1) */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track (on a scale of 0 to 1) */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track (on a scale of 0 to 1) */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the track (on a scale of 0 to 1) */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the track (on a scale of 0 to 1) */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track (in beats per minute) */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track (in milliseconds) */,
  "time_signature" REAL /* Time signature of the track (in beats per bar) */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Position of the track on the album */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the track contains explicit content */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the track */,
  "album_cover_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the artist */,
  "artist_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile image */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres the artist is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account (hashed for security) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the service */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User's music preferences */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playbacks" (
  "playback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playback event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played the track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track played */,
  "playback_date" TEXT /* Date and time the track was played */,
  "playback_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the playback (in seconds) */,
  "playback_source" TEXT /* Source of the playback */,
  "playback_context" TEXT /* Context of the playback */,
  "playback_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the playback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playbacks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playbacks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the recommendation */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track recommended */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User's rating of the recommended track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_genres" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre associated with the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_genres" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre preferred by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "genre_id")
)
